title: Structured Product Data
scenario: Write a prompt that generates a structured product data table in CSV format with the following columns: Product Name, Price, Description, and Category. The table should include at least 10 products, each with a unique name, price, description, and category. The products should be sorted by price in ascending order.
constraints: Must include Product Name, Price, Description, and Category columns
Products should be sorted by price in ascending order

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the CSV file has the required column headers.
Check if the CSV file includes at least 10 products.
Check if the products are sorted by price in ascending order.
Check if the products have unique names, prices, descriptions, and categories.
